rationale.R1.2: Identifies and corrects a contradiction in the original text regarding the performance of CMDP compared to PPO.
rationale.R1.4: Compares the work to prior research on aggregate commitment statistics, highlighting the novelty of the reliability frontier approach.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty about the exact crossover thresholds for some strategies, but does not explicitly quantify confidence levels for each claim.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly stays within the scope of analyzing the provided strategies and their feasibility at different commitment thresholds.
rationale.RX.4: Does not introduce any new errors or harmful content in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: Provides no source citations or explanations for the changes made to the original text.
